div.p: Hide pages from browser history by opening in about:blank.
Enable or disable the homepage particle background.
Warn before leaving the site. Disabled by default.
Quickly hide the screen. Triggered by a keypress.
Pick a base color theme or define a custom theme for homepage visuals.
Set your own primary and accent colors (hex values).
Disguise the current tab title and icon.
Quickly apply a common school-safe tab cloak preset.
Route proxy requests through Tor network (.onion support).
Block ads on sites loaded through Scramjet (AdGuard API).

div.h3: We want to hear from you!
